poolboy v1.17.0 bugfix: 3 bugs introduced in e3161da (Add preference score #151)

Bug 1 (CRITICAL - causes double allocation of ResourceHandles):
KopfObject.refetch() was rewritten when moving from K8sObject to KopfObject but lost the 'return self' statement and 404 handling. Since refetch() always returns None, bind_handle_to_claim treats every already-bound handle as deleted and binds a new one to the same ResourceClaim.

Bug 2: Missing 'return' in ResourceHandleMatch.__lt__() causes resource_count_difference to be ignored when sorting matches.

Bug 3: Double negation in resource_claim_description inverts bound/unbound logic.
